title: Vera Bradley Cancels Annual Outlet Sale, Names CEO
text: Vera Bradley announced significant strategic changes following Q4 2026 earnings. The company will not hold its annual outlet sale in the first quarter as it focuses on inventory for stores and elevates the overall customer and brand experience. Ian Bickley was named permanent CEO and Chairman. Martin Layding expanded role to Chief Operating and Financial Officer. The company provided FY2027 guidance of $255-$270 million in sales with at least 40% improvement in operating loss versus adjusted FY2026 operating loss. Strategic initiatives focus on elevating brand positioning and customer experience rather than relying on liquidation channels.
